title: Xenial Silky Vietnamese Marzipan Bun Cha
description: A satvik-friendly Vietnamese dish featuring marzipan and stir-fry, this bun cha is a jammy and silky delight. It is made with a variety of ingredients and cooked to perfection.
instructions: Cook the rice noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and carrots to the skillet and cook until they are tender.
Add the bean sprouts and tofu to the skillet and cook until they are heated through.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, maple syrup, and sesame oil.
Pour the sauce over the vegetables and stir to combine.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir to combine with the vegetables and sauce.
Crumble the marzipan into the skillet and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the marzipan is melted and the mixture is silky and jammy.
